Notes: Single UPDATE adds and then deletes the exact same RR for y.campus.edu.; the follow-up QUERY checks whether the RR persists.

Steps.Description: Add y.campus.edu. IN A 192.0.2.20 and then delete the exact same RR in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: y.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset remains present after the UPDATE.
